mapper.sql: id, gateway_id, gateway_name, gateway_description, gateway_version, status, auth, create_time, update_time, version

where.if: (gateway_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR gateway_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM mcp_gateway WHERE gateway_id = #{gatewayId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mcp_gateway (gateway_id, gateway_name, gateway_description, gateway_version, status, auth, create_time, update_time, version) VALUES (#{gatewayId}, #{gatewayName}, #{gatewayDescription}, #{gatewayVersion}, #{status}, #{auth}, NOW(), NOW(), 1)
mapper.update: UPDATE mcp_gateway SET status = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE gateway_id = #{gatewayId}
UPDATE mcp_gateway SET status = 0, update_time = NOW() WHERE gateway_id = #{gatewayId}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM mcp_gateway ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT
FROM mcp_gateway WHERE gateway_id = #{gatewayId} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE mcp_gateway SET auth = #{auth}, update_time = NOW() WHERE gateway_id = #{gatewayId}
